testsuite.name: com.trustsign.core.PdfSignerServiceTest
testsuite.system-out: Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 14:28:27.348 [Test worker] INFO com.trustsign.core.PdfSignerService -- Starting PDF signing. pages=3, finalVersion=false, tsaEnabled=false 14:28:27.452 [Test worker] INFO com.trustsign.core.PdfSignerService -- PDF signing completed in 104 ms. timestamped=false, tsaFallback=false
